directions_tried.name: Direct Compton-Unruh resonance
directions_tried.outcome: Ruled out by 43 orders of magnitude.

directions_tried.name: Phase 1: No-go and literature survey (attempt 1)
directions_tried.outcome: Failed — explorer worked on wrong mission.

directions_tried.name: De Sitter crossover mechanism
directions_tried.outcome: T_U/T_dS = μ_MOND identity found (novel). Free-fall resolved. But: no mechanism, factor 1/(2π) missing, falsified as modified inertia by lensing. Galaxy-scale phenomenology excellent with Verlinde correction.

explorations_completed.key_finding: Direct resonance ruled out by 43 OoM. De Sitter crossover at a~cH₀ is real.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Retry: Unruh-inertia proposals and no-go theorems
explorations_completed.key_finding: No universal no-go. McCulloch QI internally inconsistent. Surviving: Verlinde, vacuum structure, dS crossover.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: De Sitter crossover mechanism: force laws at a~cH₀
explorations_completed.key_finding: T_U/T_dS = μ_MOND algebraic identity. Reproduces MOND but no physical derivation.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Novelty search, Verlinde comparison, free-fall objection
explorations_completed.key_finding: Identity appears novel. Distinct from Verlinde. Free-fall objection unresolved (25 years).

explorations_completed.goal_summary: FDT derivation attempt and galaxy rotation curve fits
explorations_completed.key_finding: FDT route CLOSED (χ''_dS=χ''_flat). Galaxy fits: cH₀ fails, cH₀/6 matches MOND.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Free-fall objection resolution and factor of 1/6
explorations_completed.key_finding: Free-fall RESOLVED (a_dS_rel = g_N exactly). Factor 1/(2π) NOT derivable internally.
Model FALSIFIED by lensing (Bullet Cluster 5.7×). Theoretical 2/10, Observational 3/10.
